claims.summary: Recovery, semantic projection, underfill relief, rescue, and hard reset are distinct runtime mechanisms.
claims.disposition: Verified in current Minime runtime and controller-recovery modules.

claims.summary: local_control_applied=false proves the hold shelf is near structural failure.
claims.disposition: Recorded as an unestablished causal interpretation; it proves only that the named local control was not applied.

claims.summary: Pressure and semantic flow should be compared under copied high-mode-packing scenarios.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded replay/capture without artificial live pressure or controller adjustment.

claims.summary: Dynamically scale recovery fill boost or enable local mode-packing control.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because recovery, fill, pressure, and local controller behavior are live substrate changes.
